meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't deploy apps (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't deploy apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Stop Deployment Nightmares with Antigravity
content.seo_description: Overcome deployment blockers with this expert-level Antigravity project template checklist. Ship faster, impress clients, and automate your production pipeline.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting infrastructure and start shipping. The Antigravity project template acts as your standardized deployment foundation, abstracting away CI/CD complexity. By integrating Claude Code, you transform manual configuration into an automated, repeatable process, allowing you to deploy production-ready SaaS applications in minutes rather than days.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your deployment pipeline is throwing cryptic errors that defy logic. You are a builder, not a DevOps engineer, yet you find yourself trapped in a labyrinth of configuration files and environment variable mismatches. The friction between 'working on my machine' and 'live in production' is the silent killer of freelance profit margins.

Imagine a world where your infrastructure is as portable as your code. The Antigravity project template is the industry-standard blueprint for freelancers who prioritize velocity without sacrificing reliability. By standardizing your architecture, you reclaim your time and ensure every project you ship is rock-solid from day one.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a standardized project structure that separates concerns and ensures environment parity across dev, staging, and production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity standard template, ensuring strict adherence to production-ready directory structures and environment isolation.

steps.title: Configure Automated Environment Injection
steps.description: Eliminate manual .env file errors by leveraging Antigravity's secure secret management integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the project to utilize automated environment variable injection through the Antigravity secret manager, ensuring no secrets are hardcoded.

steps.title: Define Deployment Manifests
steps.description: Create a unified deployment manifest that tells your infrastructure exactly how to build and serve your application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment manifest file compatible with the Antigravity deployment engine, specifying build steps, runtime requirements, and health check endpoints.

steps.title: Integrate CI/CD Pipeline Automation
steps.description: Connect your repository to the Antigravity CI/CD pipeline to automate testing, linting, and deployment on every push.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CI/CD pipeline configuration that triggers a build, runs unit tests, and deploys to the staging environment upon merging to the main branch.

steps.title: Execute Infrastructure Validation
steps.description: Perform a dry-run validation to ensure your deployment environment matches your local development specs exactly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a validation check against the project configuration to identify any missing dependencies or environment mismatches before the first live deployment.

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated .env.example file that mirrors your production structure to prevent 'missing key' errors during runtime.
Leverage Claude Code's memory feature to store your common deployment patterns, effectively training the AI on your specific freelance coding style.
Implement health-check endpoints in your app that Antigravity can ping; it prevents 'zombie' deployments that appear successful but are non-functional.
Use tagged releases in your git history to allow for instantaneous rollbacks—never deploy 'latest' to production without a version tag.
Audit your build artifacts; if your deployment size exceeds 500MB, move static assets to a CDN and decouple them from your container image.
content.next_steps: Once your first deployment is live, audit your logs for the first 24 hours. Create a custom template based on this project to reuse for your next client, reducing your setup time by 80%.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for manual deployments that break under pressure. Our community provides the templates, the tools, and the peer review you need to scale your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
